name: machher jhol
steps: Clean and cut the rohu fish into pieces. Marinate with turmeric powder and salt.
Heat mustard oil in a pan and fry the fish pieces until golden brown. Remove and set aside.
In the same oil, add cumin seeds and let them splutter. Add sliced potatoes and fry for 5 minutes.
Add chopped tomatoes, green chilies, and turmeric powder. Cook until tomatoes are soft.
Add water and bring to a boil. Add the fried fish pieces and simmer for 15 minutes until the potatoes are cooked.
Adjust salt to taste and serve hot with steamed rice.

name: shorshe ilish
steps: Clean and cut the hilsa fish into pieces. Marinate with turmeric powder and salt.
Grind mustard seeds with 2 green chilies and a little water to make a smooth paste.
Heat mustard oil in a pan. Add the mustard paste and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the marinated fish pieces and green chilies. Pour water and bring to a boil.
Cover and simmer for 15 minutes until the fish is cooked and the oil separates.
Serve hot with steamed rice.

name: kosha mangsho
steps: Marinate mutton with turmeric powder, salt, ginger paste, and garlic paste for 30 minutes.
Heat mustard oil in a pan. Add sliced onions and fry until golden brown.
Add marinated mutton and cook on high heat for 10 minutes, stirring continuously.
Add cumin powder, coriander powder, and green chilies. Mix well and cook for another 10 minutes.
Add water, cover, and simmer for 40 minutes until the mutton is tender and the oil separates.
Serve hot with rice or roti.

name: chingri malai curry
steps: Clean and devein the prawns. Marinate with turmeric powder and salt.
Heat mustard oil in a pan. Add sliced onions and fry until golden brown.
Add ginger paste and green chilies. Cook for 2 minutes.
Add the marinated prawns and cook for 5 minutes.
Pour in the coconut milk and simmer for 15 minutes until the prawns are cooked.
Serve hot with steamed rice.

name: aloo posto
steps: Peel and cube the potatoes.
Soak poppy seeds in water for 30 minutes and grind to a smooth paste.
Heat mustard oil in a pan. Add green chilies and cubed potatoes. Fry for 5 minutes.
Add turmeric powder, salt, and poppy seed paste. Mix well.
Add water and cover. Cook for 15 minutes until the potatoes are tender.
Serve hot with steamed rice.

name: shukto
steps: Cut the bitter gourd, potato, eggplant, and raw banana into medium-sized pieces.
Heat mustard oil in a pan and add panch phoron. Once it splutters, add the vegetables.
Add turmeric powder and salt, and sauté for 5 minutes.
Add milk and ginger paste, cover, and cook until vegetables are tender.
Add slit green chilies and simmer for another 5 minutes before serving.

name: mishti doi
steps: Boil the milk in a heavy-bottomed pan until it reduces to half.
Add sugar and cardamom powder, and continue to simmer until the sugar dissolves completely.
Let the milk cool to lukewarm, then stir in the yogurt.
Pour the mixture into a clay pot, cover, and let it set in a warm place for 8 hours or until firm.

name: cholar dal
steps: Soak chana dal in water for 30 minutes, then drain.
Heat mustard oil in a pan, add panch phoron, and let it splutter.
Add ginger paste and sauté for a minute, then add the soaked dal.
Add turmeric powder, salt, and water. Cook until the dal is soft.
Add grated coconut and slit green chilies, simmer for 5 minutes, and serve.

name: doi maach
steps: Clean the rohu fish pieces and marinate with turmeric powder and salt for 10 minutes.
Heat mustard oil in a pan and fry the fish pieces until golden brown. Remove and set aside.
In the same oil, add ginger paste and sauté for a minute.
Add beaten yogurt, cumin powder, and green chilies. Cook for 5 minutes.
Add the fried fish pieces, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes. Serve hot.

name: luchi torkari
steps: Mix flour with a pinch of salt and enough water to knead into a soft dough. Let it rest for 15 minutes.
Peel and cube the potatoes.
Heat mustard oil in a pan, add panch phoron, and let it splutter.
Add potatoes, turmeric powder, salt, and slit green chilies. Sauté for 5 minutes.
Add water, cover, and cook until potatoes are tender.
Roll the dough into small balls, flatten, and deep fry in hot oil until puffed and golden. Serve with the potato curry.

name: begun bhaja
steps: Wash and slice the eggplant into thick rounds.
In a bowl, mix turmeric powder and salt. Rub this mixture onto the eggplant slices evenly.
Heat mustard oil in a pan until it starts to smoke lightly.
Fry the eggplant slices in batches until golden brown and cooked through on both sides.
Serve hot with sliced green chili on the side.

name: panch phoron dal
steps: Rinse the moong dal thoroughly and soak it in water for 10 minutes.
In a pot, add the soaked dal, water, turmeric powder, and salt. Bring to a boil and then simmer until the dal is cooked and soft.
In a separate pan, heat mustard oil and add panch phoron. Allow the spices to crackle.
Add chopped garlic and green chilies to the pan and sauté until the garlic is golden brown.
Pour the tempered spices and garlic over the cooked dal. Stir well and simmer for a few more minutes.
Serve hot with rice or roti.

name: dal tadka
steps: Rinse the toor dal thoroughly and soak it in water for 15 minutes.
In a pressure cooker, add soaked dal, 480 ml water, turmeric powder, and salt. Cook for 3 whistles.
In a pan, heat ghee and add cumin seeds. Once they splutter, add chopped onions, garlic, ginger, and green chilies. Sauté until onions are golden.
Add chopped tomatoes and cook until they soften. Add coriander powder and garam masala. Mix well.
Add the cooked dal to the pan and simmer for 10 minutes. Garnish with chopped coriander before serving.

name: paneer butter masala
steps: Cut the paneer into cubes and set aside.
In a pan, heat ghee and add cumin seeds. Once they splutter, add chopped onions, garlic, and ginger. Sauté until onions are golden.
Add chopped tomatoes and cook until they soften. Add coriander powder, garam masala, and salt. Mix well.
Add paneer cubes and cream. Simmer for 10 minutes. Garnish with chopped coriander before serving.

name: chana masala
steps: Soak chickpeas overnight and pressure cook them with 480 ml water and salt until soft.
In a pan, heat ghee and add cumin seeds. Once they splutter, add chopped onions, garlic, ginger, and green chilies. Sauté until onions are golden.
Add chopped tomatoes and cook until they soften. Add coriander powder and garam masala. Mix well.
Add the cooked chickpeas to the pan and simmer for 15 minutes. Garnish with chopped coriander before serving.

name: aloo gobi
steps: Cut potatoes and cauliflower into small pieces.
In a pan, heat ghee and add cumin seeds. Once they splutter, add chopped onions, garlic, ginger, and green chilies. Sauté until onions are golden.
Add chopped tomatoes and cook until they soften. Add turmeric powder, coriander powder, and salt. Mix well.
Add potatoes and cauliflower. Cover and cook until vegetables are tender. Add garam masala and garnish with chopped coriander before serving.

name: palak paneer
steps: Blanch spinach in boiling water for 2 minutes, then blend into a smooth paste.
In a pan, heat ghee and add cumin seeds. Once they splutter, add chopped onions, garlic, ginger, and green chilies. Sauté until onions are golden.
Add chopped tomatoes and cook until they soften. Add coriander powder and salt. Mix well.
Add spinach paste and paneer cubes. Simmer for 10 minutes. Add garam masala and cream before serving.

name: rajma
steps: Soak the rajma overnight in water.
Drain and pressure cook the rajma with water and salt until soft.
Heat ghee in a pan, add cumin seeds, and let them splutter.
Add finely chopped onions, ginger, garlic, and green chili. Sauté until golden brown.
Add chopped tomatoes, turmeric powder, and coriander powder. Cook until the tomatoes are soft.
Add the cooked rajma along with its water and simmer for 15 minutes.
Add garam masala, adjust salt, and cook for another 5 minutes.
Garnish with fresh coriander leaves and serve hot.

name: kadai paneer
steps: Cut paneer into cubes and capsicum into strips.
Dry roast coriander seeds and crush them coarsely.
Heat ghee in a pan, add chopped onions, ginger, and garlic. Sauté until golden.
Add chopped tomatoes, red chili powder, and salt. Cook until tomatoes are soft.
Add capsicum and cook for 5 minutes, then add paneer cubes.
Add crushed coriander seeds and garam masala. Cook for another 5 minutes.
Garnish with fresh coriander leaves and serve hot.

name: jeera rice
steps: Wash and soak basmati rice for 15 minutes.
Heat ghee in a pan, add cumin seeds, bay leaf, cloves, and cinnamon stick. Sauté for a minute.
Drain the rice and add it to the pan. Sauté for 2 minutes.
Add water and salt, bring to a boil, then cover and simmer until rice is cooked.
Fluff the rice with a fork and serve hot.

name: matar paneer
steps: Cut paneer into cubes and chop onions, tomatoes, ginger, and garlic.
Heat ghee in a pan, add cumin seeds, and let them splutter.
Add onions, ginger, and garlic. Sauté until golden brown.
Add tomatoes, turmeric powder, coriander powder, and salt. Cook until tomatoes are soft.
Add green peas and paneer cubes. Cook for 10 minutes.
Add garam masala, mix well, and cook for another 5 minutes.
Garnish with fresh coriander leaves and serve hot.

name: shahi paneer
steps: Cut paneer into cubes and chop onions, tomatoes, ginger, and garlic.
Soak cashew nuts in warm water for 10 minutes and blend into a smooth paste.
Heat ghee in a pan, add cumin seeds, and let them splutter.
Add onions, ginger, and garlic. Sauté until golden brown.
Add tomatoes and cook until soft. Add cashew paste and cook for 5 minutes.
Add paneer cubes, cream, garam masala, and salt. Cook for 10 minutes.
Garnish with fresh coriander leaves and serve hot.

name: aloo paratha
steps: Boil the potatoes until soft, peel and mash them.
Finely chop the green chilies and coriander.
In a bowl, mix mashed potatoes, green chilies, coriander, cumin seeds, and salt.
Knead the flour with water to make a soft dough.
Divide the dough and potato mixture into equal portions.
Roll out a dough ball, place potato mixture in the center, and fold the edges over.
Roll the stuffed dough into a flat circle.
Heat a tawa and cook the paratha on both sides, applying ghee until golden brown.

name: puri bhaji
steps: Boil the potatoes, peel, and roughly mash them.
In a pan, heat oil and add mustard seeds, green chilies, and curry leaves.
Add turmeric powder and mashed potatoes, mix well, and add salt.
Knead flour with water to make a stiff dough and divide into small balls.
Roll each ball into a small circle and deep fry in hot oil until puffed and golden.
Serve the puris hot with the potato bhaji.

name: baingan bharta
steps: Roast the eggplant over an open flame until the skin is charred and the inside is soft.
Peel the charred skin, mash the eggplant, and set aside.
Heat mustard oil in a pan, add chopped onions, and sauté until golden.
Add chopped tomatoes, green chilies, garlic, and ginger, cook until tomatoes are soft.
Add mashed eggplant, coriander powder, and salt, cook for 10 minutes.
Garnish with fresh coriander before serving.

name: dal makhani
steps: Soak urad dal and rajma overnight in water.
Pressure cook the soaked dal and rajma with water until soft.
In a pan, heat ghee, add chopped onions, and sauté until golden.
Add chopped tomatoes, ginger, garlic, and cook until tomatoes are soft.
Add cooked dal, rajma, garam masala, and salt, simmer for 30 minutes.
Serve hot with a dollop of ghee on top.

name: mix veg curry
steps: Chop all vegetables into bite-sized pieces.
Heat ghee in a pan, add cumin seeds, and let them splutter.
Add chopped onions and sauté until golden.
Add tomatoes, turmeric powder, coriander powder, and cook until tomatoes are soft.
Add all vegetables, salt, and a little water, cover, and cook until vegetables are tender.
Sprinkle garam masala, mix well, and cook for another 5 minutes before serving.

name: butter chicken
steps: Marinate the chicken with yogurt, ginger paste, garlic paste, and salt for at least 1 hour.
Heat ghee in a pan and sauté chopped onions until golden brown.
Add tomato puree, coriander powder, cumin powder, and green chilies. Cook until the oil separates.
Add the marinated chicken and cook until the chicken is done.
Stir in cream and garam masala. Simmer for 5 minutes and serve hot.

name: chicken tikka masala
steps: Marinate the chicken with yogurt, ginger paste, garlic paste, and salt for at least 1 hour.
Grill the marinated chicken until cooked through and slightly charred.
Heat ghee in a pan and sauté chopped onions until golden brown.
Add tomato puree, coriander powder, cumin powder, and cook until the oil separates.
Add grilled chicken, cream, and garam masala. Simmer for 10 minutes and serve hot.

name: mutton rogan josh
steps: Heat mustard oil in a heavy-bottomed pan and add bay leaves.
Add chopped onions and sauté until golden brown.
Add ginger paste, garlic paste, and sauté for a minute.
Add mutton pieces, yogurt, coriander powder, cumin powder, red chili powder, and salt. Cook on low heat until mutton is tender.
Sprinkle garam masala and simmer for 5 minutes before serving.

name: chicken biryani
steps: Marinate the chicken with yogurt, ginger paste, garlic paste, and salt for at least 1 hour.
Cook basmati rice until 70% done and set aside.
Heat ghee in a pan, sauté sliced onions until golden brown, then add tomatoes and cook until soft.
Add marinated chicken, coriander powder, cumin powder, and cook until chicken is done.
Layer the chicken and rice in a pot, sprinkle saffron soaked in milk, and garam masala. Cover and cook on low heat for 20 minutes. Serve hot.

name: seekh kebab
steps: Finely chop the onion, green chilies, and coriander.
In a bowl, mix minced lamb with onion, ginger paste, garlic paste, green chilies, coriander, cumin powder, garam masala, and salt.
Shape the mixture onto skewers to form kebabs.
Grill the kebabs over medium heat until cooked through and slightly charred. Serve hot.

name: chicken korma
steps: Marinate the chicken pieces in yogurt, half of the ginger and garlic paste, and salt for 30 minutes.
Slice the onions thinly and fry them in ghee until golden brown. Remove and set aside.
In the same ghee, add the remaining ginger and garlic paste, green chilies, coriander powder, cumin powder, and garam masala. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the marinated chicken to the pan and cook until the chicken is tender and the oil separates.
Garnish with fried onions and serve hot.

name: keema matar
steps: Heat mustard oil in a pan and sauté chopped onions until golden brown.
Add minced garlic and ginger, cook for 2 minutes.
Add chopped tomatoes, coriander powder, turmeric powder, and salt. Cook until tomatoes are soft.
Add minced meat and cook until browned. Add green peas and garam masala, cook for another 10 minutes.
Serve hot with roti or rice.

name: tandoori chicken
steps: Mix yogurt, lime juice, minced garlic, grated ginger, red chili powder, coriander powder, cumin powder, garam masala, and salt to make the marinade.
Make deep cuts in the chicken pieces and coat them with the marinade. Let it sit for at least 2 hours or overnight in the fridge.
Preheat the oven to 200°C. Place the marinated chicken on a baking tray.
Bake for 30-40 minutes, turning halfway, until the chicken is cooked through and slightly charred.
Serve hot with lemon wedges and onion rings.

name: achari chicken
steps: Heat mustard oil in a pan and add fenugreek seeds, fennel seeds, and nigella seeds. Sauté for a minute.
Add sliced onions and cook until golden brown. Add minced garlic and ginger, cook for 2 minutes.
Add chicken pieces, coriander powder, turmeric powder, and salt. Cook until chicken is browned.
Add yogurt and cook on low heat until the chicken is tender and the oil separates.
Serve hot with naan or rice.

name: egg curry
steps: Boil the eggs, peel them, and set aside.
Heat mustard oil in a pan and sauté chopped onions until golden brown.
Add minced garlic, grated ginger, chopped tomatoes, coriander powder, turmeric powder, and salt. Cook until tomatoes are soft.
Add the boiled eggs and garam masala, cook for another 5 minutes.
Serve hot with rice or roti.

name: anda bhurji
steps: Finely chop the onion, tomato, spring onions, ginger, and garlic.
Heat mustard oil in a pan and sauté the onions until golden brown.
Add chopped tomatoes, spring onions, ginger, and garlic. Cook until tomatoes are soft.
Add turmeric powder, coriander powder, and salt. Mix well.
Break the eggs into the pan and scramble them with the mixture.
Cook until the eggs are fully cooked. Garnish with chopped coriander and serve hot.

name: naan
steps: In a bowl, mix flour, salt, sugar, and baking powder.
Add yogurt and milk to the dry ingredients and knead into a soft dough.
Cover the dough with a damp cloth and let it rest for 2 hours.
Divide the dough into equal portions and roll each into a ball.
Roll out each ball into an oval shape and cook on a hot tawa until bubbles form.
Flip and cook the other side. Brush with ghee and serve hot.

name: laccha paratha
steps: In a bowl, mix flour and salt. Add water gradually to form a dough.
Knead the dough well and let it rest for 15 minutes.
Divide the dough into equal portions and roll each into a ball.
Roll out each ball into a thin circle, apply ghee, and fold into pleats.
Roll the pleated dough into a spiral and flatten it slightly.
Cook on a hot tawa, applying ghee, until golden brown on both sides.

name: samosa
steps: Boil potato, peel, and mash it. Boil peas separately.
In a pan, heat ghee and add cumin seeds, chopped spring onions, and ginger.
Add mashed potato, peas, coriander powder, garam masala, and salt. Mix well and let it cool.
Make a dough with flour, salt, ghee, and water. Roll into small circles.
Cut each circle in half, form a cone, and fill with the potato mixture.
Seal the edges and deep fry in hot oil until golden brown.

name: chole bhature
steps: Soak chickpeas overnight and boil until soft.
In a pan, heat ghee and add cumin seeds, chopped onion, ginger, and garlic.
Add chopped tomato, turmeric powder, coriander powder, garam masala, and salt. Cook until oil separates.
Add boiled chickpeas and simmer for 20 minutes.
For bhature, mix flour, yogurt, baking powder, and water to form a dough.
Let the dough rest for 30 minutes, then roll into circles and deep fry until puffed and golden.

name: masala dosa
steps: Soak rice and urad dal with fenugreek seeds separately for 6 hours.
Grind them separately to a smooth batter, mix together, and ferment overnight.
Boil potatoes, peel, and mash them. Sauté onions, green chilies, mustard seeds, and curry leaves in coconut oil. Add turmeric and salt, then mix with potatoes.
Heat a tawa, pour a ladle of batter, spread into a thin circle, drizzle coconut oil, and cook until golden brown. Place potato filling in the center and fold.

name: idli sambar
steps: Soak rice and urad dal separately for 6 hours. Grind them to a smooth batter, mix, and ferment overnight.
Pour batter into idli molds and steam for 10-15 minutes.
Cook toor dal until soft. Add tamarind extract, chopped vegetables, sambar powder, and salt. Simmer until vegetables are tender.
In coconut oil, temper mustard seeds, curry leaves, and add to the sambar. Serve hot with idlis.

name: upma
steps: Dry roast rava until fragrant and set aside.
In coconut oil, sauté mustard seeds, curry leaves, chopped onions, green chilies, and ginger.
Add water and salt, bring to a boil. Gradually add roasted rava, stirring continuously to avoid lumps.
Cook until water is absorbed and upma is fluffy. Serve hot.

name: rasam
steps: Cook toor dal until soft and mash it.
Soak tamarind in warm water and extract the juice.
In a pot, combine tamarind juice, chopped tomatoes, rasam powder, salt, and water. Bring to a boil.
Add mashed dal and simmer. In coconut oil, temper mustard seeds, curry leaves, and asafoetida, then add to the rasam. Serve hot.

name: avial
steps: Cut mixed vegetables into uniform pieces and cook until tender.
Grind coconut, green chilies, and cumin seeds into a coarse paste.
Add the coconut paste to the cooked vegetables, mix well, and cook for a few minutes.
Add curd and salt, mix gently. Drizzle with coconut oil and garnish with curry leaves. Serve warm.

name: sambar
steps: Rinse and cook the toor dal with 600 ml of water until soft.
Soak tamarind in 120 ml of warm water and extract the juice.
In a pot, heat coconut oil and add mustard seeds, curry leaves, dried red chili, and asafoetida.
Add mixed vegetables and sauté for 5 minutes.
Add tamarind juice, sambar powder, and salt. Cook until vegetables are tender.
Add cooked dal to the pot and simmer for 10 minutes. Adjust consistency with water if needed.

name: coconut chutney
steps: Grind coconut, green chili, ginger, and salt with 60 ml of water to a smooth paste.
Heat coconut oil in a small pan and add mustard seeds, urad dal, and curry leaves.
Once the mustard seeds splutter, pour the tempering over the ground coconut mixture.
Mix well and serve with dosa or idli.

name: pongal
steps: Rinse rice and moong dal together and cook with 800 ml of water until soft.
In a pan, heat coconut oil and add black pepper, cumin seeds, curry leaves, and chopped ginger.
Once the spices are fragrant, add them to the cooked rice and dal mixture.
Add salt and mix well. Serve hot with coconut chutney.

name: curd rice
steps: Mix cooked rice with curd and salt until well combined.
In a small pan, heat coconut oil and add mustard seeds, curry leaves, and dried red chili.
Once the mustard seeds splutter, pour the tempering over the curd rice.
Mix well and serve chilled or at room temperature.

name: bisi bele bath
steps: Rinse and cook rice and toor dal together with 1000 ml of water until soft.
Soak tamarind in 120 ml of warm water and extract the juice.
In a pot, heat coconut oil and add mustard seeds and curry leaves.
Add mixed vegetables and sauté for 5 minutes.
Add tamarind juice, bisi bele bath powder, and salt. Cook until vegetables are tender.
Add the cooked rice and dal mixture to the pot and simmer for 10 minutes. Adjust consistency with water if needed.

name: medu vada
steps: Soak the urad dal in water for 4 hours.
Drain the water and grind the urad dal to a smooth batter, adding minimal water.
Mix in chopped green chilies, curry leaves, black pepper, asafoetida, and salt.
Heat coconut oil in a pan. Shape the batter into small doughnut shapes and deep fry until golden brown.

name: appam with stew
steps: Soak the raw rice for 6 hours and grind to a smooth batter with coconut milk and yeast. Allow to ferment overnight.
For the stew, boil potatoes, carrots, and green beans until tender.
Heat coconut oil in a pan, add mustard seeds and curry leaves, then add the boiled vegetables.
Add coconut milk and salt to the vegetables, simmer for 10 minutes. Serve appam with the stew.

name: pesarattu
steps: Soak green gram and rice for 3 hours.
Grind soaked green gram, rice, green chilies, ginger, and cumin seeds to a smooth batter.
Add salt to the batter and mix well.
Heat a pan, spread a ladle of batter thinly, drizzle coconut oil, and cook until crispy. Serve hot.

name: kootu
steps: Cook chana dal until soft.
Add chopped bottle gourd to the dal and cook until tender.
Grind coconut with water to a paste and add to the cooked dal and bottle gourd.
In a pan, heat coconut oil, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, and asafoetida, then pour over the kootu. Mix well and serve.

name: thayir sadam
steps: Cook rice until soft and let it cool.
Mix the cooled rice with curd and salt.
Heat coconut oil in a pan, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, dried red chili, and asafoetida.
Pour the tempering over the curd rice, mix well, and serve chilled or at room temperature.

name: kerala fish curry
steps: Clean and cut the fish into pieces.
Heat coconut oil in a pan and add mustard seeds. Once they splutter, add curry leaves, sliced shallots, garlic, and ginger. Sauté until the shallots turn golden brown.
Add turmeric powder, red chili powder, and coriander powder. Stir for a minute.
Add coconut milk, tamarind pulp, and salt. Bring it to a boil.
Add the fish pieces and green chilies. Simmer until the fish is cooked through and the gravy thickens.
Serve hot with rice.

name: chettinad chicken curry
steps: Clean and cut the chicken into pieces.
Heat coconut oil in a pan and add fennel seeds. Once they crackle, add curry leaves, chopped onions, garlic, and ginger. Sauté until the onions are golden brown.
Add chopped tomatoes and cook until they are soft.
Add coriander powder, red chili powder, black pepper, and salt. Stir well.
Add the chicken pieces and mix to coat with the spices. Cook until the chicken is done and the gravy thickens.
Serve hot with rice or roti.

name: prawn masala
steps: Clean and devein the prawns.
Heat coconut oil in a pan and add mustard seeds. Once they splutter, add curry leaves, chopped onions, garlic, and ginger. Sauté until the onions turn golden brown.
Add chopped tomatoes and cook until they are soft.
Add turmeric powder, red chili powder, coriander powder, and salt. Mix well.
Add the prawns and cook until they are done and the masala thickens.
Serve hot with rice or chapati.

name: fish fry
steps: Clean and cut the fish into slices.
In a bowl, mix turmeric powder, red chili powder, black pepper, and salt. Add lemon juice to make a paste.
Coat the fish slices with the spice paste and marinate for 10 minutes.
Heat coconut oil in a pan and fry the fish slices until they are golden brown and crispy on both sides.
Serve hot with lemon wedges.

name: egg thokku
steps: Boil the eggs, peel them, and set aside.
Heat coconut oil in a pan and add mustard seeds. Once they splutter, add curry leaves, chopped onions, garlic, and ginger. Sauté until the onions turn golden brown.
Add chopped tomatoes and cook until they are soft.
Add turmeric powder, red chili powder, and salt. Mix well.
Add the boiled eggs and gently mix to coat them with the masala. Cook for a few minutes until the eggs are heated through.
Serve hot with rice or chapati.

name: tomato rice
steps: Cook the rice in 480 ml of water until tender, then set aside.
Heat coconut oil in a pan, add mustard seeds and let them splutter.
Add urad dal, dried red chili, curry leaves, and asafoetida. Sauté until the dal turns golden.
Add chopped tomatoes and salt, cook until tomatoes are soft.
Mix in the cooked rice and garnish with chopped coriander.

name: lemon rice
steps: Cook the rice in 480 ml of water until tender, then set aside.
Heat coconut oil in a pan, add mustard seeds and let them splutter.
Add urad dal, peanuts, dried red chili, and curry leaves. Sauté until the dal and peanuts are golden.
Add turmeric powder and salt, then stir in the cooked rice.
Squeeze lemon juice over the rice, mix well, and serve.

name: tamarind rice
steps: Soak tamarind in 120 ml of warm water for 10 minutes, then extract the juice and set aside.
Cook the rice in 480 ml of water until tender, then set aside.
Heat coconut oil in a pan, add mustard seeds and let them splutter.
Add urad dal, peanuts, dried red chili, curry leaves, and asafoetida. Sauté until the dal and peanuts are golden.
Add the tamarind juice and salt, cook until the mixture thickens slightly.
Mix in the cooked rice until well combined, then serve.

name: pav bhaji
steps: Boil potatoes, cauliflower, and green peas until soft. Mash them and set aside.
Heat butter in a pan, add chopped onions, ginger, and garlic. Sauté until onions are golden.
Add chopped tomatoes and cook until soft. Add pav bhaji masala and mix well.
Add the mashed vegetables to the pan, mix thoroughly, and cook for 10 minutes. Adjust salt to taste.
Garnish with chopped coriander and serve hot with buttered pav and lemon wedges.

name: vada pav
steps: Boil and mash potatoes. Mix with chopped green chili, garlic, mustard seeds, curry leaves, and turmeric powder.
Form the potato mixture into small balls.
Prepare a batter with besan and water. Dip the potato balls into the batter and deep fry until golden.
Slice pav and spread tamarind and green chutney inside.
Place a vada in each pav and serve hot.

name: bhel puri
steps: In a large bowl, mix puffed rice, sev, finely chopped onion, tomato, and boiled potato.
Add tamarind chutney, green chutney, chaat masala, and black salt. Mix well.
Garnish with chopped coriander.
Serve immediately to maintain the crispiness.

name: pani puri
steps: Prepare pani by blending mint leaves, coriander, green chili, black salt, and chaat masala with water.
Soak tamarind in water and extract the pulp. Mix with pani.
Mash boiled potatoes and mix with boiled chickpeas.
Make a small hole in each puri and fill with the potato-chickpea mixture.
Serve puris with the prepared pani.

name: dahi puri
steps: Mash boiled potatoes and season with chaat masala and black salt.
Make a small hole in each puri and fill with the potato mixture.
Top each puri with yogurt, tamarind chutney, and green chutney.
Sprinkle sev and garnish with chopped coriander.
Serve immediately to enjoy the crispiness of the puris.

name: aloo tikki chaat
steps: Boil the potatoes until tender, peel, and mash them.
Finely chop green chilies and ginger, and mix them into the mashed potatoes along with chaat masala and black salt.
Shape the mixture into small patties and shallow fry them until golden brown.
Place the tikkis on a plate, top with yogurt, tamarind chutney, and green chutney.
Sprinkle with black salt, chaat masala, and garnish with sev and coriander.

name: kathi roll
steps: Cut the chicken into thin strips and marinate with ginger garlic paste, coriander powder, cumin powder, garam masala, and lemon juice for 15 minutes.
Slice the onion and capsicum thinly.
Heat oil in a pan, add marinated chicken, and cook until done. Add sliced onions and capsicum, sauté briefly.
Warm the chapatis on a tawa, spread green chutney, place the chicken mixture, and roll tightly.
Serve hot with additional chutney if desired.

name: papdi chaat
steps: Arrange papdis on a serving plate.
Dice the boiled potato and spread over the papdis along with boiled chickpeas.
Drizzle yogurt, tamarind chutney, and green chutney over the top.
Sprinkle chaat masala, black salt, and sev.
Garnish with chopped coriander and serve immediately.

name: masala chai
steps: Crush ginger, cardamom pods, and cloves together.
Boil water in a saucepan, add the crushed spices, and let it simmer for 2 minutes.
Add tea leaves and sugar, and simmer for another 2 minutes.
Pour in the milk and bring the mixture to a boil.
Strain the tea into cups and serve hot.

name: mango lassi
steps: Peel and chop the mango, removing the seed.
In a blender, combine mango pieces, yogurt, milk, sugar, and cardamom powder.
Blend until smooth and creamy.
Pour into glasses and chill before serving.

name: kung pao chicken
steps: Cut the chicken breast into bite-sized pieces and marinate with 15 ml light soy sauce, 15 ml Shaoxing rice wine, and 15 g cornstarch for 10 minutes.
Heat a wok over high heat and add 30 ml vegetable oil. Stir-fry the peanuts until golden and remove.
In the same oil, add dried red chilies, ginger, and garlic. Stir-fry until aromatic.
Add the marinated chicken and stir-fry until cooked through, achieving wok hei.
Add the peanuts, spring onion, 15 ml dark soy sauce, 15 ml light soy sauce, rice vinegar, and sugar. Stir well.
Finish with sesame oil and serve hot.

name: mapo tofu
steps: Cut the tofu into cubes and set aside.
Heat a wok over high heat, add 30 ml vegetable oil, and stir-fry ginger and garlic until fragrant.
Add doubanjiang and stir-fry for a minute to release its aroma.
Add the tofu cubes and gently stir to coat with the sauce.
Pour in the vegetable stock and light soy sauce. Bring to a simmer.
Mix cornstarch with a little water to make a slurry and add to the wok to thicken the sauce.
Finish with sesame oil and chopped spring onion. Serve hot.

name: fried rice
steps: Beat the eggs and set aside. Chop the spring onion and carrot.
Heat a wok over high heat and add 30 ml vegetable oil. Add the beaten eggs and scramble lightly.
Add the chopped carrot and peas, stir-frying quickly to retain crunch.
Add the cooked rice, breaking up any clumps. Stir-fry to achieve wok hei.
Add light soy sauce and mix well. Stir in the spring onion.
Finish with sesame oil and serve immediately.

name: beef and broccoli
steps: Slice the beef thinly against the grain and marinate with 15 ml light soy sauce, 15 ml Shaoxing rice wine, and 15 g cornstarch for 10 minutes.
Cut the broccoli into florets and blanch in boiling water for 2 minutes. Drain and set aside.
Heat a wok over high heat and add 30 ml vegetable oil. Stir-fry ginger and garlic until fragrant.
Add the marinated beef and stir-fry until browned, achieving wok hei.
Add the broccoli, 15 ml dark soy sauce, and 15 ml light soy sauce. Stir well to combine.
Finish with sesame oil and serve hot.

name: spring rolls
steps: Shred the cabbage and carrot finely. Mince the ginger and garlic.
Heat a wok over high heat, add a little vegetable oil, and stir-fry ginger and garlic until fragrant.
Add cabbage, carrot, and bean sprouts. Stir-fry quickly, then add light soy sauce and mix well. Allow to cool.
Place a spoonful of filling on each spring roll wrapper, fold, and roll tightly, sealing the edges with a little water.
Heat 500 ml vegetable oil in a wok. Deep-fry the spring rolls until golden and crispy.
Drain on paper towels, finish with a drizzle of sesame oil, and serve hot.

name: dim sum dumplings
steps: Finely chop the shrimp, ginger, garlic, and spring onions.
In a bowl, mix pork mince, chopped shrimp, ginger, garlic, spring onions, light soy sauce, and sesame oil until well combined.
Place a spoonful of filling in the center of each dumpling wrapper.
Fold the wrapper over the filling and pleat the edges to seal.
Steam the dumplings in a bamboo steamer over boiling water for 10-12 minutes until cooked through.

name: sweet and sour pork
steps: Cut pork into bite-sized pieces and coat with cornstarch.
Heat oil in a wok over high heat and fry pork until golden brown. Remove and set aside.
In the same wok, stir-fry chopped onion, capsicum, and capsicum until slightly softened.
Add pineapple chunks, rice vinegar, ketchup, sugar, and light soy sauce. Stir well.
Return the pork to the wok, toss everything together, and cook for another 5 minutes until the sauce thickens.

name: hot and sour soup
steps: Slice chicken, tofu, and mushrooms thinly.
Bring chicken stock to a boil in a pot, then add chicken slices and cook until done.
Add tofu, mushrooms, and bamboo shoots to the pot.
Mix rice vinegar, light soy sauce, and white pepper in a bowl, then add to the soup.
Thicken the soup with a cornstarch slurry, then slowly drizzle in a beaten egg while stirring to create egg ribbons.

name: chow mein
steps: Cook egg noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
Slice chicken and vegetables thinly.
Heat oil in a wok over high heat, add garlic, and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add chicken and stir-fry until cooked through.
Add cabbage, carrot, and bean sprouts, and stir-fry briefly.
Add noodles, light soy sauce, and dark soy sauce, and toss everything together over high heat to achieve wok hei.
Finish with a drizzle of sesame oil before serving.

name: peking duck
steps: Clean the duck and pat dry. Rub the inside with five-spice powder, ginger, and spring onions.
Mix honey, light soy sauce, and Shaoxing rice wine to create a glaze.
Brush the duck with the glaze and let it air dry for at least 2 hours.
Preheat the oven to 190°C and roast the duck for 60 minutes, brushing with glaze every 20 minutes.
Let the duck rest before carving. Serve with pancakes, hoisin sauce, and sliced spring onions.

name: dan dan noodles
steps: Cook the noodles in boiling water until al dente, then drain and set aside.
In a wok, heat a small amount of oil over high heat and add the pork mince. Stir-fry until browned.
Add the doubanjiang, minced garlic, and ginger to the pork and stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
Add the light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, and chicken stock. Let it simmer for 5 minutes.
In a bowl, mix sesame paste with some hot water to loosen it, then add to the wok and stir well.
Divide the cooked noodles into bowls, pour the sauce over them, and top with chopped spring onions, crushed peanuts, and a drizzle of sesame oil.

name: char siu pork
steps: In a bowl, mix hoisin sauce, light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, honey, Shaoxing rice wine, minced garlic, grated ginger, and five-spice powder to make the marinade.
Marinate the pork shoulder in the mixture for at least 2 hours or overnight in the refrigerator.
Preheat the oven to 180°C. Place the marinated pork on a rack over a baking tray.
Roast the pork for 40-45 minutes, basting with the remaining marinade every 10 minutes, until the pork is cooked and caramelized.
Let the pork rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.

name: wonton soup
steps: In a bowl, mix pork mince, chopped shrimp, light soy sauce, minced garlic, grated ginger, and chopped spring onions.
Place a teaspoon of filling in the center of each wonton wrapper. Moisten the edges with water and fold to seal.
Bring the chicken stock to a boil in a pot. Add the wontons and cook for 5-7 minutes until they float to the surface.
Serve the wontons in bowls with the broth, garnished with a drizzle of sesame oil and chopped spring onions.

name: stir fried vegetables
steps: Cut the broccoli into florets, slice the carrot and capsicum, and trim the snow peas.
Heat a wok over high heat until smoking, then add a small amount of oil.
Add minced garlic and grated ginger, stir-fry for 30 seconds, then add all the vegetables.
Stir-fry the vegetables for 5-7 minutes, adding light soy sauce halfway through.
Remove from heat and drizzle with sesame oil before serving.

name: steamed fish with ginger
steps: Clean and pat dry the whole fish. Score the fish on both sides.
Place slices of ginger and spring onion inside the cavity and on top of the fish.
Steam the fish over boiling water for 10-12 minutes until cooked through.
In a small pan, heat light soy sauce and Shaoxing rice wine, then pour over the steamed fish.
Finish with a drizzle of sesame oil and garnish with additional spring onion slices before serving.

name: red braised pork belly
steps: Cut the pork belly into 3 cm cubes.
Slice the ginger and crush the garlic cloves.
In a pot, bring water to a boil and blanch the pork belly for 5 minutes. Drain and set aside.
In a wok, heat a small amount of oil over medium heat. Add ginger, garlic, and star anise, stir-frying until fragrant.
Add the pork belly to the wok and stir-fry until browned.
Add light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, Shaoxing rice wine, and rock sugar. Stir well.
Pour in water to cover the pork. Bring to a boil, then reduce to a simmer and cover. Cook for 60-90 minutes until the pork is tender.
Adjust seasoning if necessary and garnish with chopped spring onion before serving.

name: scallion pancakes
steps: In a bowl, mix flour and water to form a dough. Knead until smooth and let it rest for 30 minutes.
Chop the spring onion finely.
Divide the dough into four equal parts. Roll each part into a thin circle.
Brush each circle with sesame oil, sprinkle with salt, and scatter chopped spring onion over the surface.
Roll the dough into a cylinder, then coil it into a spiral. Flatten gently with a rolling pin.
Heat a pan over medium heat and cook each pancake until golden brown on both sides.
Cut into wedges and serve warm.

name: congee
steps: Rinse the rice under cold water until the water runs clear.
In a large pot, combine rice, chicken broth, and water. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, stirring occasionally, for about 1.5 to 2 hours until the rice breaks down and the congee is creamy.
Slice the ginger and add to the pot along with the chicken breast. Cook until the chicken is tender.
Remove the chicken, shred it, and return to the pot.
Season with salt and garnish with chopped spring onion and a drizzle of sesame oil before serving.

name: chicken teriyaki
steps: Mix soy sauce, mirin, sake, sugar, and grated ginger in a bowl to make the teriyaki sauce.
Marinate the chicken thighs in the teriyaki sauce for at least 10 minutes.
Heat a pan over medium heat and place the chicken thighs skin-side down. Cook until the skin is golden brown.
Flip the chicken and pour the remaining marinade into the pan. Simmer until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce is thickened.

name: miso soup
steps: Heat dashi in a pot over medium heat until it begins to simmer.
Add diced tofu and rehydrated wakame to the pot.
In a small bowl, mix miso paste with a little hot dashi to dissolve, then add to the pot.
Stir gently and remove from heat. Garnish with sliced spring onions before serving.

name: tonkatsu
steps: Pound the pork loin to about 1 cm thickness.
Coat the pork in flour, dip in beaten egg, and then cover with panko breadcrumbs.
Heat oil in a pan to 170°C and fry the pork until golden brown and cooked through.
Slice the tonkatsu and serve with finely shredded cabbage and tonkatsu sauce.

name: gyudon beef bowl
steps: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
Slice the onion and beef thinly.
In a pan, combine soy sauce, mirin, sake, and sugar. Add onion and simmer until soft.
Add beef slices and cook until just done. Serve over a bowl of rice.

name: oyakodon
steps: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
Slice the onion and cut chicken into bite-sized pieces.
In a pan, combine dashi, soy sauce, and mirin. Add onion and simmer until soft.
Add chicken and cook until done. Beat eggs and pour over the chicken. Cover and cook until eggs are just set. Serve over rice.

name: yakitori
steps: Soak bamboo skewers in water for 30 minutes to prevent burning.
Cut chicken thighs into bite-sized pieces and slice spring onions into 3 cm lengths.
In a saucepan, combine soy sauce, mirin, sake, and sugar. Bring to a boil, then simmer until slightly thickened.
Thread chicken and spring onion alternately onto skewers.
Grill skewers over medium heat, basting with sauce, until chicken is cooked through and slightly charred.

name: ramen
steps: In a pot, combine dashi, soy sauce, and mirin. Bring to a simmer.
Cook pork belly in the broth until tender, then remove and slice thinly.
Boil eggs for 7 minutes, then cool in ice water and peel.
Cook ramen noodles according to package instructions, then drain.
Divide noodles into bowls, pour over hot broth, and top with sliced pork, halved eggs, nori, and sliced spring onions.

name: onigiri
steps: Rinse rice under cold water until water runs clear, then drain.
Cook rice with water in a rice cooker or pot until tender.
Grill or pan-fry salted salmon until cooked through, then flake into small pieces.
Wet hands with water and sprinkle with salt. Take a handful of rice, flatten slightly, and place a piece of salmon in the center.
Shape rice into a triangle, enclosing the salmon, and wrap with a strip of nori.

name: takoyaki
steps: Cut octopus into small, bite-sized pieces.
In a bowl, mix flour, dashi, and egg to form a smooth batter.
Heat a takoyaki pan and lightly oil each compartment.
Pour batter into each compartment, add a piece of octopus, some chopped spring onion, and pickled ginger.
Cook until the bottom is golden brown, then turn each ball with a skewer to cook evenly. Serve with takoyaki sauce and sprinkle with bonito flakes.

name: agedashi tofu
steps: Cut tofu into cubes and pat dry with paper towels.
Coat tofu cubes in potato starch, shaking off excess.
Heat oil in a pan and fry tofu until golden brown. Drain on paper towels.
In a saucepan, combine dashi, soy sauce, and mirin. Heat gently.
Serve tofu in a bowl, pour over the hot broth, and garnish with sliced spring onions and grated daikon.

name: katsu curry
steps: Slice the chicken breast into cutlets and season with salt and pepper.
Coat the chicken in flour, dip in beaten egg, and cover with panko breadcrumbs.
Heat vegetable oil in a pan and fry the chicken until golden brown and cooked through.
In a separate pot, sauté sliced onion, carrot, and potato until softened.
Add curry powder, dashi, soy sauce, and mirin to the vegetables and simmer until the vegetables are tender.
Slice the fried chicken and serve over rice with the curry sauce poured on top.

name: chawanmushi
steps: Beat the eggs gently and mix with dashi, soy sauce, and mirin.
Strain the egg mixture to remove bubbles.
Place sliced shiitake mushrooms and kamaboko in small cups.
Pour the egg mixture over the ingredients in the cups.
Steam the cups over low heat for about 15-20 minutes until set.
Garnish with chopped spring onion before serving.

name: tamagoyaki
steps: Beat the eggs with dashi, soy sauce, mirin, and sugar until well combined.
Heat a rectangular tamagoyaki pan and lightly oil it.
Pour a thin layer of the egg mixture into the pan and cook until slightly set.
Roll the cooked egg to one side of the pan, add more egg mixture, and repeat the process.
Continue layering and rolling until all the egg mixture is used.
Slice the rolled omelette and serve warm.

name: okonomiyaki
steps: Thinly slice the cabbage and chop the spring onions.
In a bowl, mix flour, dashi, and eggs to form a batter.
Add the cabbage and spring onions to the batter and mix well.
Heat a non-stick pan and pour in the batter to form a pancake.
Cook on medium heat until the bottom is golden brown, then flip and cook the other side.
Serve with okonomiyaki sauce, mayonnaise, and sprinkle with bonito flakes.

name: nikujaga
steps: Peel and cut the potatoes and carrot into bite-sized pieces.
Slice the onion thinly.
In a pot, sauté the beef slices until browned.
Add the onion, potatoes, and carrot to the pot and cook for a few minutes.
Pour in dashi, soy sauce, mirin, and sugar, and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer until the vegetables are tender and the flavors meld.

name: dashi broth
steps: Wipe the kombu with a damp cloth to clean it, but do not remove the white powdery substance as it adds flavor.
Place the kombu and water in a pot and let it soak for 30 minutes.
Heat the pot over medium heat until just before it starts to boil, then remove the kombu.
Add the katsuobushi to the pot and bring to a boil. Once boiling, turn off the heat and let it sit for 5 minutes.
Strain the broth through a fine mesh sieve or cheesecloth to remove the katsuobushi flakes. The clear liquid is your dashi broth.

name: edamame
steps: Bring the water to a boil in a large pot.
Add the edamame to the boiling water and cook for 5 minutes.
Drain the edamame and sprinkle with salt while they are still hot.
Toss the edamame to evenly distribute the salt, then serve warm.

name: karaage chicken
steps: Cut the chicken thighs into bite-sized pieces.
In a bowl, mix soy sauce, sake, mirin, grated ginger, and minced garlic to make the marinade.
Add the chicken pieces to the marinade and let them marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Heat the oil in a deep pan to 170°C.
Coat the marinated chicken pieces with potato starch, shaking off any excess.
Fry the chicken in batches until golden brown and cooked through, about 5 minutes per batch.
Drain the fried chicken on paper towels and serve hot.

name: pad thai
steps: Soak rice noodles in warm water for 10 minutes, then drain.
In a wok, heat oil and sauté chopped garlic until fragrant.
Add shrimp and tofu, stir-fry until shrimp is cooked.
Push ingredients to the side, crack eggs in the center, scramble, and mix.
Add noodles, fish sauce, tamarind paste, and palm sugar. Stir well.
Toss in bean sprouts, peanuts, and chopped spring onions.
Serve hot with lime wedges and sliced bird's eye chilies.

name: green curry
steps: Slice chicken breast into thin pieces.
In a pot, heat green curry paste with a small amount of coconut milk until fragrant.
Add chicken and cook until no longer pink.
Pour in remaining coconut milk, add kaffir lime leaves, and bring to a simmer.
Add bamboo shoots and sliced eggplant, cook until tender.
Season with fish sauce and palm sugar, adjust to taste.
Stir in Thai basil and sliced bird's eye chilies before serving.

name: tom yum soup
steps: Bring water to a boil in a pot, add bruised lemongrass, sliced galangal, and kaffir lime leaves.
Add mushrooms and tomatoes, cook until mushrooms are tender.
Add shrimp and cook until they turn pink.
Season with fish sauce and lime juice, adjust to taste.
Add sliced bird's eye chilies and garnish with coriander before serving.

name: massaman curry
steps: Cut beef into chunks and slice potatoes and onion.
In a pot, heat massaman curry paste with a small amount of coconut milk until fragrant.
Add beef and cook until browned.
Pour in remaining coconut milk, add potatoes, onion, cinnamon stick, and cardamom pods.
Simmer until beef is tender and potatoes are cooked.
Stir in peanuts, fish sauce, and palm sugar, adjust to taste.
Serve hot with steamed rice.

name: pad see ew
steps: Soak rice noodles in warm water for 10 minutes, then drain.
Slice chicken breast thinly and chop Chinese broccoli.
In a wok, heat oil and sauté chopped garlic until fragrant.
Add chicken and cook until no longer pink, then push to one side.
Crack egg into the wok, scramble, and mix with chicken.
Add noodles, soy sauce, dark soy sauce, fish sauce, and sugar. Stir well.
Toss in Chinese broccoli and stir-fry until just wilted.
Serve hot, adjusting seasoning if needed.

name: panang curry
steps: Slice the chicken breast into thin pieces.
In a pot, heat a small amount of coconut milk and add the panang curry paste. Stir until fragrant.
Add the sliced chicken and cook until it changes color.
Pour in the remaining coconut milk, add kaffir lime leaves, palm sugar, and fish sauce. Simmer until the chicken is cooked through.
Garnish with sliced red chili and Thai basil before serving.

name: tom kha gai
steps: Slice the chicken breast and mushrooms.
In a pot, bring coconut milk to a simmer. Add sliced galangal, lemongrass, and kaffir lime leaves.
Add the chicken and mushrooms, cook until the chicken is done.
Season with fish sauce and lime juice. Add bird's eye chilies.
Garnish with fresh coriander before serving.

name: larb moo
steps: Cook the minced pork in a pan over medium heat until fully cooked.
Remove from heat and let it cool slightly. Add sliced shallots.
Season with fish sauce, lime juice, and toasted rice powder. Mix well.
Add chopped mint leaves, coriander, and bird's eye chilies. Mix again.
Serve with fresh vegetables or lettuce leaves.

name: mango sticky rice
steps: Rinse the glutinous rice several times until the water runs clear.
Soak the rice in water for at least 4 hours or overnight.
Drain the rice and steam it in a bamboo steamer for about 20 minutes until cooked.
In a saucepan, heat the coconut cream with palm sugar and salt until dissolved.
Mix half of the coconut cream mixture with the cooked rice and let it sit for 10 minutes.
Peel and slice the mangoes.
Serve the sticky rice with mango slices and drizzle the remaining coconut cream on top.

name: thai basil chicken
steps: Slice the chicken breast into thin strips.
Pound the garlic and bird's eye chilies together in a mortar and pestle.
Heat the vegetable oil in a wok over medium heat.
Add the garlic and chili paste and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add the chicken and stir-fry until cooked through.
Add the fish sauce and palm sugar, stirring to combine.
Add the thai basil leaves and stir-fry until just wilted.
Serve hot with steamed rice.

name: satay chicken
steps: Cut the chicken thighs into bite-sized pieces.
In a bowl, mix coconut milk, curry powder, fish sauce, and palm sugar.
Add the chicken pieces to the marinade and let it sit for at least 1 hour.
Soak the bamboo skewers in water for 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated chicken onto the skewers.
Grill the skewers over medium heat until the chicken is cooked through and slightly charred.
Serve with peanut sauce and cucumber salad.

name: red curry
steps: Slice the chicken breast and eggplant into bite-sized pieces.
Heat a saucepan over medium heat and add the red curry paste.
Add a portion of the coconut milk to the paste and stir until fragrant.
Add the chicken and eggplant, stirring to coat with the curry paste.
Pour in the remaining coconut milk and bring to a simmer.
Add the kaffir lime leaves, fish sauce, and palm sugar.
Simmer until the chicken is cooked and the eggplant is tender.
Stir in the thai basil leaves just before serving.

name: spaghetti carbonara
steps: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the spaghetti until al dente.
While the pasta cooks, cut the guanciale into small cubes and cook in a pan over medium heat until crispy.
In a bowl, beat the egg yolks and mix with grated pecorino romano and freshly ground black pepper.

Drain the spaghetti, reserving some pasta water. Add the spaghetti to the pan with guanciale, remove from heat, and quickly mix in the egg and cheese mixture, adding reserved pasta water as needed to create a creamy sauce.

name: pasta pomodoro
steps: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the spaghetti until al dente.
In a pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat and sauté the minced garlic until fragrant.
Add the crushed San Marzano tomatoes to the pan and simmer for 10 minutes.
Toss the cooked spaghetti with the tomato sauce, add fresh basil leaves, and serve immediately.

name: risotto milanese
steps: Bring the vegetable broth to a simmer and add the saffron threads to infuse.
In a separate pan, sauté the finely chopped onion in olive oil until translucent.
Add the arborio rice to the pan and toast for a few minutes, stirring constantly.
Gradually add the saffron-infused broth to the rice, stirring frequently, until the rice is creamy and cooked through. Stir in grated Parmigiano-Reggiano before serving.

name: osso buco
steps: Dust the veal shanks with flour, shaking off excess.
In a large pot, heat olive oil and brown the veal shanks on all sides. Remove and set aside.
In the same pot, sauté chopped carrot, celery, and onion until soft. Add tomato paste and cook for a few more minutes.

Return the veal to the pot, add white wine, and reduce by half. Add beef broth, cover, and simmer for 1.5 to 2 hours until the meat is tender. Garnish with lemon zest and chopped parsley before serving.

name: chicken parmigiana
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Pound the chicken breasts to an even thickness. Dredge in flour, dip in beaten eggs, and coat with breadcrumbs.
Fry the breaded chicken in olive oil until golden brown on both sides.

Place the chicken in a baking dish, top with tomato sauce made from sautéed garlic and San Marzano tomatoes, and cover with slices of mozzarella and grated Parmigiano-Reggiano. Bake until the cheese is bubbly and golden. Garnish with fresh basil before serving.

name: bruschetta
steps: Dice the tomatoes and place them in a bowl.
Add chopped basil, salt, and black pepper to the tomatoes.
Slice the ciabatta bread and toast it until golden brown.
Rub each slice of toasted bread with a garlic clove.
Top the bread with the tomato mixture and drizzle with olive oil.

name: minestrone soup
steps: Chop the carrot, celery, onion, and zucchini into small pieces.
Heat olive oil in a large pot and sauté the chopped vegetables until softened.
Add the canned tomatoes, vegetable broth, and beans to the pot.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
Add the pasta and cook until al dente, about 10 minutes.
Season with salt, pepper, and fresh basil before serving.

name: lasagna
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Chop the onion and sauté in olive oil until translucent.
Add ground beef and cook until browned, then add canned tomatoes, salt, and pepper.
Simmer the sauce for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
In a baking dish, layer lasagna sheets, meat sauce, ricotta, and mozzarella.
Repeat layers, finishing with mozzarella and parmigiano-reggiano on top.
Bake for 40 minutes or until the top is golden and bubbly.
Let it rest for 10 minutes before serving with fresh basil.

name: cacio e pepe
steps: Boil water in a large pot, add salt, and cook spaghetti until al dente.
Grate pecorino romano cheese finely.
In a pan, heat olive oil and toast black pepper until fragrant.
Reserve some pasta water, then drain spaghetti and add to the pan.
Remove from heat, add cheese, and mix, adding pasta water to create a creamy sauce.
Serve immediately with extra black pepper on top.

name: tiramisu
steps: Brew the espresso and let it cool. Mix with Marsala wine.
In a bowl, whisk egg yolks and sugar until creamy.
Gently fold in mascarpone cheese until smooth.
Dip each savoiardi briefly in the espresso mixture and layer them in a dish.
Spread half of the mascarpone mixture over the savoiardi.
Repeat with another layer of dipped savoiardi and the remaining mascarpone mixture.
Dust the top with cocoa powder.
Refrigerate for at least 4 hours before serving.

name: pesto pasta
steps: Cook the spaghetti in salted boiling water until al dente.
In a food processor, blend basil leaves, pine nuts, garlic, and salt.
Slowly add olive oil while blending until smooth.
Stir in grated Parmigiano-Reggiano.
Drain the pasta, reserving some cooking water.
Mix the pesto with the pasta, adding reserved water if needed.
Serve immediately with extra Parmigiano-Reggiano on top.

name: saltimbocca
steps: Place a sage leaf and a slice of prosciutto on each veal cutlet.
Secure with a toothpick.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Cook the veal cutlets for 2-3 minutes on each side until golden.
Remove cutlets and deglaze the pan with white wine.
Add butter, salt, and pepper to the sauce.
Return cutlets to the pan and coat with the sauce.
Serve immediately.

name: ribollita
steps: Soak and cook the cannellini beans until tender.
In a large pot, heat olive oil and sauté chopped onion, carrot, and celery.
Add chopped tomatoes and cook until softened.
Stir in kale and cooked beans, season with salt and pepper.
Add water to cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
Add chunks of stale bread and cook for another 15 minutes.
Adjust seasoning and serve warm.

name: pasta e fagioli
steps: Soak and cook the cannellini beans until tender.
In a pot, heat olive oil and sauté diced pancetta until crispy.
Add chopped onion, carrot, and celery, cook until softened.
Stir in tomato paste and cook for 2 minutes.
Add cooked beans and water to cover, season with salt and pepper.
Simmer for 30 minutes, then add ditalini pasta.
Cook until pasta is al dente, adjust seasoning.
Serve hot with a drizzle of olive oil.

name: classic beef burger
steps: Divide the ground beef into 4 equal portions and shape into patties.
Season each patty with salt and black pepper on both sides.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and cook the patties for about 4 minutes on each side or until desired doneness.
Place a slice of cheddar cheese on each patty during the last minute of cooking to melt.
Toast the burger buns lightly in the skillet.
Assemble the burgers by placing a patty on the bottom bun, followed by lettuce, a slice of tomato, onion rings, ketchup, and mustard. Top with the other half of the bun.

name: bbq pulled pork
steps: Mix smoked paprika, brown sugar, salt, and black pepper in a bowl.
Rub the spice mixture all over the pork shoulder.
Place the pork in a slow cooker with sliced onion and apple cider vinegar.
Cook on low heat for about 4 hours or until the pork is tender and easily shredded.
Remove the pork from the cooker and shred it using two forks.
Mix the shredded pork with bbq sauce and serve on buns or as desired.

name: mac and cheese
steps: Cook macaroni according to package instructions, then drain and set aside.
In a saucepan, melt butter over medium heat, then stir in flour to form a roux.
Gradually add milk, whisking constantly until the mixture thickens.
Add grated sharp cheddar cheese, salt, and black pepper, stirring until the cheese is melted and the sauce is smooth.
Combine the cheese sauce with the cooked macaroni and mix well before serving.

name: clam chowder
steps: Clean and chop the clams, reserving the juice.
Peel and dice the potatoes, chop the onion and celery.
In a large pot, melt butter and sauté onion and celery until soft.
Stir in flour to make a roux, then gradually add milk and reserved clam juice, stirring until thickened.
Add potatoes and clams, season with salt and black pepper, and simmer until potatoes are tender.
Serve hot with crusty bread.

name: buffalo chicken wings
steps: Heat vegetable oil in a deep fryer or large pot to 180°C.
Season chicken wings with salt and black pepper.
Fry the wings in batches for about 10-12 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
In a small saucepan, melt butter and mix with hot sauce to make the buffalo sauce.
Toss the fried wings in the buffalo sauce until well coated and serve immediately.

name: coleslaw
steps: Thinly slice the cabbage and grate the carrot.
In a large bowl, combine cabbage and carrot.
In a separate bowl, mix mayonnaise, vinegar, sugar, salt, and pepper.
Pour the dressing over the cabbage mixture and toss to coat.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.

name: grilled cheese sandwich
steps: Spread butter on one side of each bread slice.
Place cheese between two slices of bread, buttered sides out.
Heat a pan over medium heat and place the sandwich in the pan.
Cook until the bread is golden brown and the cheese is melted, flipping once.
Repeat with the second sandwich. Serve hot.

name: chicken pot pie
steps: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Cook chicken in a pan until no longer pink, then shred.
In the same pan, sauté onion, carrot, and potato in butter until soft.
Stir in flour, then add chicken broth and milk, stirring until thickened.
Add chicken and peas, then pour mixture into a baking dish.
Cover with puff pastry, seal edges, and cut slits for steam.
Bake for 30-35 minutes until the pastry is golden brown.

name: beef chili
steps: Chop the onion and garlic finely.
Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and garlic, sauté until soft.
Add ground beef to the pot, cook until browned.
Stir in chili powder, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper. Cook for 2 minutes.
Add canned tomatoes and kidney beans. Stir well, bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 2 hours, stirring occasionally.

name: banana bread
steps: Preheat the oven to 175°C (350°F). Grease a loaf pan.
Mash bananas in a bowl. Melt butter and mix with mashed bananas.
Add sugar, egg, and vanilla extract to the banana mixture. Mix well.
Combine flour, baking soda, and salt in another bowl. Gradually add to banana mixture.
Pour batter into the prepared loaf pan.
Bake for 60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.

name: caesar salad
steps: Wash and chop the romaine lettuce into bite-sized pieces.
Grate the parmesan cheese finely.
In a large bowl, combine lettuce, croutons, and parmesan cheese.
Squeeze lemon juice over the salad and add caesar dressing.
Toss the salad gently to combine all ingredients.
Season with black pepper to taste before serving.

name: baked potato soup
steps: Peel and cube the potatoes. Chop the onion finely.
In a large pot, melt butter over medium heat. Add onion and sauté until translucent.
Add potatoes and vegetable broth to the pot. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until potatoes are tender.
Use a potato masher to slightly mash the potatoes in the pot.
Stir in milk and cheddar cheese. Cook until cheese is melted and soup is heated through.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste before serving.

name: sloppy joe
steps: Chop the onion and capsicum finely.
In a large skillet, cook ground beef over medium heat until browned. Drain excess fat.
Add onion and capsicum to the skillet. Cook until vegetables are soft.
Stir in tomato sauce, ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, brown sugar, salt, and black pepper.
Simmer the mixture for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve the meat mixture on burger buns.

name: chicken tacos
steps: Soak ancho chilies in hot water for 15 minutes, then blend with garlic and a pinch of salt to make a paste.
Dice the onion and chop the coriander. Set aside.
Cut chicken breast into small strips and marinate with the chili paste for 10 minutes.
Heat lard in a pan over medium heat, add onion and sauté until translucent.
Add marinated chicken to the pan and cook until fully cooked, about 10 minutes.
Warm the corn tortillas on a dry skillet.
Assemble tacos by placing chicken mixture on tortillas, garnish with coriander and a squeeze of lime.

name: beef enchiladas
steps: Soak guajillo chilies in hot water for 15 minutes, then blend with tomatoes and garlic to make a sauce.
Dice the onion and sauté in lard until translucent.
Add ground beef to the pan and cook until browned, about 10 minutes. Season with salt.
Preheat oven to 180°C. Spread some sauce on the bottom of a baking dish.
Fill each tortilla with beef mixture, roll up, and place in the dish seam side down.
Pour remaining sauce over enchiladas and sprinkle with crumbled queso fresco.
Bake for 20 minutes until heated through and cheese is melted.

name: guacamole
steps: Halve and pit the avocados, then scoop the flesh into a bowl.
Mash the avocado with a fork to desired consistency.
Finely chop the onion, coriander, and jalapeño, and add to the bowl.
Squeeze lime juice over the mixture and add salt.
Mix everything together until well combined. Adjust seasoning if needed.

name: black bean soup
steps: Rinse and soak black beans overnight or for at least 8 hours.
Dice the onion and tomatoes, and mince the garlic.
In a large pot, heat lard over medium heat and sauté onion and garlic until fragrant.
Add soaked beans, tomatoes, chipotle chili, and epazote to the pot.
Cover with water and bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for about 1 hour until beans are tender.
Season with salt and adjust seasoning to taste. Serve hot.

name: chicken quesadilla
steps: Dice the chicken breast and season with salt.
Heat lard in a pan over medium heat and cook chicken until fully cooked, about 10 minutes.
Finely chop onion, jalapeño, and coriander.
Grate or crumble queso fresco.
Place a tortilla in a dry skillet, sprinkle with cheese, chicken, onion, jalapeño, and coriander.
Top with another tortilla and cook until cheese is melted and tortillas are golden, about 3 minutes per side.
Cut into wedges and serve hot.

name: pozole
steps: Soak the dried ancho and guajillo chilies in hot water for 20 minutes.
In a large pot, add pork shoulder, onion, garlic, bay leaves, and water. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 90 minutes.
Blend the soaked chilies with a little soaking water to make a paste.
Add the chili paste, hominy, and oregano to the pot. Simmer for another 30 minutes. Season with salt.

name: chiles rellenos
steps: Roast the poblano peppers until the skin is charred. Peel and remove seeds.
Stuff each pepper with queso fresco.
Separate egg whites and yolks. Beat whites until stiff peaks form, then fold in yolks.
Dust peppers with flour, dip in egg batter, and fry in hot oil until golden. Season with salt.

name: elote
steps: Boil or grill the corn until cooked.
Spread mayonnaise evenly over each cob.
Sprinkle generously with crumbled queso cotija.
Squeeze lime juice over the top and dust with chili powder.

name: tamales
steps: Soak the corn husks in warm water until pliable.
Mix masa harina, lard, and chicken broth to form a dough. Season with salt.
Blend soaked chipotle chilies into a paste and mix with shredded chicken.
Spread masa dough on corn husks, add chicken filling, fold, and steam for 90 minutes.

name: carne asada
steps: Marinate the steak with lime juice, minced garlic, chopped coriander, salt, and pepper for at least 1 hour.
Preheat a grill to high heat.
Grill the steak for 5-7 minutes on each side for medium-rare.
Rest the steak for 5 minutes before slicing thinly against the grain.

name: tortilla soup
steps: Cut the tortillas into strips and fry them in neutral oil until crispy. Set aside.
In a pot, heat some oil and sauté the chopped onion and garlic until translucent.
Add chopped tomatoes and chipotle chili, cooking until the tomatoes are soft.
Add chicken broth and bring to a boil. Add the chicken breast and simmer until cooked through, about 20 minutes.
Remove the chicken, shred it, and return it to the pot. Season with salt.
Serve the soup topped with tortilla strips, diced avocado, crumbled queso fresco, chopped coriander, and a squeeze of lime.

name: salsa verde
steps: Husk and rinse the tomatillos. Boil them in water with the serrano chilies until soft, about 10 minutes.
Drain the tomatillos and chilies and place them in a blender.
Add the chopped onion, garlic cloves, and coriander to the blender.
Blend until smooth, adding salt to taste.
Serve the salsa verde as a condiment or dip.

name: huevos rancheros
steps: In a skillet, heat some oil and sauté chopped onion, garlic, and jalapeño until soft.
Add chopped tomatoes and cook until the mixture thickens into a sauce.
In another skillet, fry the tortillas in oil until crispy and set aside.
Fry the eggs sunny-side up in the same skillet.
Place each fried tortilla on a plate, top with tomato sauce, a fried egg, crumbled queso fresco, and chopped coriander.

name: carnitas
steps: Cut the pork shoulder into large chunks and season with salt and pepper.
In a large pot, melt the lard over medium heat and add the pork chunks.
Add the juice of the orange, onion, garlic, bay leaves, and cinnamon stick.
Cover and cook on low heat until the pork is tender and can be shredded easily, about 2.5 hours.
Remove the lid and increase the heat to medium-high to allow the pork to crisp up, stirring occasionally.
Serve the carnitas with tortillas and your choice of toppings.

name: bibimbap
steps: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
Blanch the spinach in boiling water for 1 minute, then drain and squeeze out excess water.
Sauté the bean sprouts with 5 ml of sesame oil and 1 minced garlic clove for 2 minutes.
Julienne the carrot and sauté with 5 ml of sesame oil until tender.
Slice the shiitake mushrooms and sauté with soy sauce and 1 minced garlic clove until soft.
Fry the eggs sunny-side up.
In a bowl, arrange the rice, vegetables, and egg. Add gochujang and sprinkle with sesame seeds.

name: kimchi jjigae
steps: Slice the pork belly into bite-sized pieces.
Chop the onion and spring onions, and mince the garlic.
In a pot, sauté the pork belly until browned.
Add the kimchi, onion, garlic, gochugaru, and fish sauce. Stir well.
Pour in the water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
Cut the tofu into cubes and add to the stew. Simmer for another 5 minutes.
Garnish with chopped spring onions before serving.

name: bulgogi
steps: Thinly slice the beef ribeye against the grain.
Grate the pear and mince the garlic.
In a bowl, mix soy sauce, sugar, grated pear, minced garlic, sesame oil, and black pepper.
Add the beef slices to the marinade and mix well. Let it marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Heat a pan over medium-high heat and cook the beef until browned and cooked through.
Garnish with chopped spring onions and sesame seeds before serving.

name: japchae
steps: Cook the sweet potato noodles according to package instructions, then rinse in cold water.
Slice the beef sirloin thinly and marinate with 30 ml soy sauce, 15 g sugar, and minced garlic.
Blanch the spinach and squeeze out excess water.
Julienne the carrot and slice the shiitake mushrooms.
In a pan, sauté the beef until cooked, then remove and set aside.
Sauté the carrot and mushrooms with 15 ml sesame oil until tender.
In a large bowl, combine noodles, beef, spinach, carrot, and mushrooms.
Add remaining soy sauce and sesame oil. Mix well and garnish with chopped spring onions.

name: tteokbokki
steps: Soak the rice cakes in warm water for 10 minutes if they are hard.
Slice the onion and chop the spring onions.
In a pot, combine water, gochujang, gochugaru, soy sauce, sugar, and minced garlic. Bring to a boil.
Add the rice cakes and onion to the pot. Cook until the rice cakes are soft and the sauce thickens.
Garnish with chopped spring onions before serving.

name: doenjang jjigae
steps: Cut the pork belly into bite-sized pieces.
Slice the tofu, zucchini, potato, and onion into small cubes.
In a pot, add water and doenjang, and bring to a boil.
Add the pork belly, potato, and onion. Simmer for 15 minutes.
Add the tofu, zucchini, minced garlic, and sliced green chili. Cook for another 10 minutes.
Drizzle sesame oil before serving.

name: galbi
steps: Grate the pear and mince the garlic.
In a bowl, mix soy sauce, sugar, grated pear, minced garlic, sesame oil, and black pepper.
Marinate the beef short ribs in the mixture for at least 2 hours.
Preheat a grill or pan over medium heat.
Cook the marinated ribs for about 10 minutes on each side until caramelized and cooked through.
Garnish with chopped spring onion before serving.

name: sundubu jjigae
steps: Slice the pork belly and onion. Mince the garlic.
In a pot, heat sesame oil and add pork belly. Cook until browned.
Add minced garlic, sliced onion, and gochugaru. Stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Pour in water and bring to a boil. Add fish sauce.
Add the soft tofu in large chunks and simmer for 10 minutes.
Crack an egg into the stew and let it cook for 2 minutes before serving.

name: korean fried chicken
steps: Coat the chicken wings with cornstarch evenly.
Heat vegetable oil in a deep pan for frying.
Fry the chicken wings until golden and crispy, about 10 minutes.
In a separate pan, mix gochujang, soy sauce, sugar, and minced garlic. Heat until the sauce thickens.
Toss the fried chicken in the sauce until well coated.
Sprinkle sesame seed over the chicken before serving.

name: pajeon
steps: Mix flour and water in a bowl to form a smooth batter.
Beat the egg and add it to the batter.
Chop the spring onions into 5 cm lengths and add to the batter.
Heat vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
Pour the batter into the pan, spreading it evenly.
Cook until the bottom is golden brown, then flip and cook the other side.
Serve with soy sauce for dipping.

name: kongnamul
steps: Rinse the soybean sprouts thoroughly under cold water.
Bring 240 ml of water to a boil in a pot and add a pinch of salt.
Add the soybean sprouts to the boiling water and cook for 5 minutes.
Drain the sprouts and transfer them to a mixing bowl.
Mince the garlic and add it to the bowl with the sprouts.
Add sesame oil, soy sauce, gochugaru, and sesame seeds to the bowl.
Mix everything well until the sprouts are evenly coated.
Serve the kongnamul as a side dish or banchan.

name: samgyeopsal
steps: Slice the pork belly into thin strips, about 1 cm thick.
Heat a grill pan over medium-high heat.
Place the pork belly slices on the grill and cook for about 3-4 minutes on each side until crispy.
Mince the garlic and mix it with sesame oil, salt, and pepper.
Serve the grilled pork belly with the garlic sesame oil mixture, ssamjang, lettuce, and perilla leaves.
Wrap the pork belly in lettuce or perilla leaves with a bit of ssamjang and enjoy.

name: kimbap
steps: Cook the short-grain rice and let it cool slightly.
Julienne the carrot and cucumber into thin strips.
Blanch the spinach in boiling water for 1 minute, then drain and squeeze out excess water.
Beat the eggs and cook them in a pan to make a thin omelet, then slice into strips.
Lay a sheet of nori on a bamboo mat, shiny side down.
Spread a thin layer of rice over the nori, leaving a 2 cm border at the top.
Arrange the carrot, cucumber, spinach, egg, and imitation crab sticks in a line on top of the rice.
Roll the kimbap tightly using the bamboo mat, then slice into bite-sized pieces.
Brush the rolls with sesame oil and sprinkle with a pinch of salt before serving.

name: yukgaejang
steps: Place the beef brisket in a pot with 1000 ml of water and bring to a boil.
Simmer for 60 minutes until the beef is tender, then remove and shred the beef.
Add the shredded beef back to the pot along with bean sprouts, minced garlic, gochugaru, doenjang, and soy sauce.
Slice the spring onions and add them to the pot.
Simmer for another 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Finish with sesame oil before serving the yukgaejang hot.

name: hummus
steps: Drain and rinse the chickpeas.
In a food processor, combine chickpeas, tahini, lime juice, garlic cloves, olive oil, salt, and cumin.
Blend until smooth, adding water gradually to achieve desired consistency.
Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary. Serve drizzled with olive oil.

name: falafel
steps: Soak chickpeas in water overnight, then drain.
In a food processor, combine chickpeas, onion, garlic, parsley, cumin, coriander, baking soda, and salt.
Process until mixture is coarse and holds together when formed into a ball.
Form mixture into small balls and fry in hot olive oil until golden brown. Drain on paper towels.

name: greek salad
steps: Chop cucumber, tomatoes, and red onion into bite-sized pieces.
Combine vegetables in a large bowl with olives.
Crumble feta cheese over the salad.
Drizzle with olive oil and lime juice, sprinkle with oregano and salt, and toss gently to combine.

name: moussaka
steps: Slice eggplants, sprinkle with salt, and let sit for 30 minutes to remove bitterness. Rinse and pat dry.
In a pan, heat olive oil and fry eggplant slices until golden. Set aside.
In the same pan, sauté chopped onion and garlic until soft. Add ground lamb and cook until browned.
Stir in tomato paste, red wine, cinnamon stick, salt, and pepper. Simmer until thickened.
Layer eggplant and meat sauce in a baking dish, top with béchamel sauce, and bake at 180°C until golden brown.

name: tzatziki
steps: Grate the cucumber and squeeze out excess water.
Mince the garlic cloves finely.
In a bowl, combine Greek yogurt, grated cucumber, minced garlic, olive oil, and lime juice.
Chop dill finely and add to the mixture along with salt. Mix well.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.

name: shakshuka
steps: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Chop onion and capsicum, then add to the pan and sauté until soft.
Mince garlic and add to the pan, cooking for 1 minute.
Add chopped tomatoes, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper. Simmer for 10 minutes.
Make small wells in the sauce and crack eggs into each well.
Cover the pan and cook until eggs are set to your liking.
Serve hot with crusty bread.

name: tabbouleh
steps: Soak bulgur in hot water for 10 minutes, then drain and squeeze out excess water.
Finely chop coriander, mint, tomatoes, and cucumber.
In a large bowl, combine bulgur, coriander, mint, tomatoes, and cucumber.
Add lime juice, olive oil, and salt. Mix well.
Let the salad sit for 15 minutes to allow flavors to meld before serving.

name: lamb kebab
steps: Finely chop onion and parsley, and mince garlic.
In a bowl, combine ground lamb, chopped onion, minced garlic, cumin, coriander, salt, black pepper, and parsley.
Mix well and form into small sausage-like shapes around skewers.
Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
Grill kebabs for about 10-15 minutes, turning occasionally, until cooked through.
Serve hot with pita and yogurt sauce.

name: pita bread
steps: In a bowl, mix yeast, sugar, and warm water. Let it sit for 10 minutes until frothy.
In a large bowl, combine flour and salt. Add the yeast mixture and olive oil.
Knead the dough for about 10 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in an oiled bowl, cover, and let it rise for 1 hour until doubled in size.
Preheat oven to 250°C with a baking stone or tray inside.
Divide the dough into 8 pieces, roll each into a ball, and flatten into discs.
