Bake each disc on the hot stone or tray for 5-7 minutes until puffed and slightly browned.
Cool on a wire rack before serving.

name: lentil soup
steps: Rinse the red lentils under cold water until the water runs clear.
Chop the onion, carrot, and garlic cloves finely.
In a large pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the onion, carrot, and garlic, and sauté until the onion is translucent.
Add the lentils, vegetable broth, cumin powder, salt, and black pepper to the pot. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 30 minutes, or until the lentils are soft.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth. Stir in the lime juice.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.

name: baba ganoush
steps: Preheat the oven to 220°C.
Prick the eggplants with a fork and place them on a baking sheet. Roast for 40 minutes, turning occasionally, until the skin is charred and the flesh is soft.
Allow the eggplants to cool slightly, then peel off the skin and scoop out the flesh into a bowl.
Mash the eggplant flesh with a fork. Add tahini, lime juice, minced garlic, olive oil, and salt. Mix well until smooth.
Transfer to a serving dish and drizzle with additional olive oil. Garnish with chopped parsley.

name: chicken shawarma
steps: Slice the chicken breasts into thin strips.
In a bowl, combine Greek yogurt, lime juice, minced garlic, cumin, coriander, paprika, turmeric, olive oil, salt, and black pepper. Mix well.
Add the chicken strips to the marinade, ensuring they are well coated. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour, preferably overnight.
Preheat a grill or skillet over medium-high heat. Cook the marinated chicken strips for about 5-7 minutes on each side, until cooked through and slightly charred.
Serve the chicken shawarma in pita bread with fresh vegetables and a drizzle of tahini sauce.

name: fattoush salad
steps: Toast the pita bread until crispy, then break into bite-sized pieces.
Chop the tomatoes, cucumber, radishes, and romaine lettuce into bite-sized pieces.
In a large bowl, combine the chopped vegetables, parsley, and mint leaves.
In a small bowl, whisk together lime juice, olive oil, sumac, and salt to make the dressing.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss well to combine. Add the toasted pita pieces and toss again before serving.

name: pho bo
steps: Char the onion and ginger over an open flame until blackened. Rinse and set aside.
In a large pot, add beef bones and brisket, cover with water, and bring to a boil. Simmer for 5 minutes, then drain and rinse the bones and meat.
Refill the pot with 4 liters of water, add the bones, brisket, charred onion, ginger, fish sauce, rock sugar, cinnamon, star anise, and cloves. Simmer for 3-4 hours, skimming any impurities.
Soak rice noodles in warm water for 30 minutes, then drain.
Slice the brisket thinly and set aside.
Strain the broth, discarding solids. Adjust seasoning with additional fish sauce if needed.
Cook rice noodles in boiling water for 1-2 minutes, then drain.
Divide noodles into bowls, top with sliced brisket, and ladle hot broth over. Serve with bean sprouts, Thai basil, mint, lime wedges, and sliced chili.

name: banh mi
steps: Thinly slice pork belly and marinate with fish sauce and sugar for 15 minutes.
Julienne carrot and daikon, then pickle in vinegar and sugar for 10 minutes.
Grill or pan-fry pork belly until cooked through.
Slice baguette lengthwise and spread mayonnaise on both sides.
Layer with grilled pork, pickled vegetables, cucumber slices, coriander, and sliced chili.

name: bun bo hue
steps: In a large pot, add beef shank and pork hock, cover with water, and bring to a boil. Simmer for 5 minutes, then drain and rinse.
Refill the pot with 4 liters of water, add meat, bruised lemongrass, onion, shrimp paste, and fish sauce. Simmer for 3 hours.
Strain the broth, discarding solids. Adjust seasoning with fish sauce and add chili oil.
Cook rice vermicelli in boiling water for 3-4 minutes, then drain.
Divide vermicelli into bowls, top with sliced meat, and ladle hot broth over. Serve with bean sprouts, Thai basil, and lime wedges.

name: goi cuon
steps: Boil shrimp until pink and cooked through, then peel and set aside.
Boil pork belly until cooked, then slice thinly.
Cook rice vermicelli in boiling water for 3-4 minutes, then drain.
Dip rice paper in warm water to soften, then lay flat.
Place a small amount of vermicelli, lettuce, herbs, shrimp, and pork on rice paper, then roll tightly.
Serve with a dipping sauce made from fish sauce, sugar, lime juice, and crushed peanuts.

name: com tam
steps: Marinate pork chop with fish sauce, sugar, and minced garlic for 30 minutes.
Cook broken rice according to package instructions.
Grill or pan-fry pork chop until cooked through.
Fry eggs sunny-side up.
Serve rice topped with pork chop, fried egg, sliced cucumber, tomato, and spring onion oil.

name: ca kho to
steps: Cut the catfish into chunks and marinate with fish sauce and black pepper for 15 minutes.
In a clay pot, caramelize sugar over medium heat until it turns golden brown.
Add minced garlic, sliced shallots, and sliced chili to the caramel and stir for 2 minutes.
Place the marinated catfish in the pot, cover with water, and simmer for 45 minutes until the fish is tender.
Garnish with chopped spring onions before serving.

name: bun cha
steps: Slice the pork belly thinly and marinate with fish sauce, sugar, and minced garlic for 20 minutes.
Form the ground pork into small patties and marinate similarly.
Grill the pork belly slices and patties over charcoal until cooked and slightly charred.
Cook the rice vermicelli according to package instructions and drain.
Serve the grilled pork with vermicelli, fresh herbs, and lettuce, accompanied by nuoc cham dipping sauce.

name: banh xeo
steps: Mix flour, coconut milk, turmeric powder, and a pinch of salt to form a batter.
Slice pork belly thinly and cook until browned, then add shrimp and cook until pink.
Pour a ladle of batter into a hot pan, spreading it thinly, and add pork, shrimp, sliced onion, and bean sprouts.
Cook until the edges are crispy, fold the pancake in half, and serve with fresh herbs and nuoc cham.

name: che ba mau
steps: Cook mung beans until soft, then mix with a portion of sugar.
Cook red kidney beans separately until tender.
Boil agar agar with pandan leaves and remaining sugar until dissolved, then let it set and cut into cubes.
Layer mung beans, kidney beans, and agar cubes in a glass, top with coconut milk, and serve chilled.

name: aloo paratha with curd
steps: Boil and mash the potatoes.
Mix whole wheat flour, salt, and water to form a dough.
Add cumin seeds, chopped green chili, and coriander leaves to the mashed potatoes.
Divide the dough into balls and roll each ball into a flat circle.
Place a portion of the potato filling in the center of the rolled dough and seal it.
Roll out the stuffed dough ball gently to form a paratha.
Heat ghee in a pan and cook the paratha until golden brown on both sides.
Serve hot with curd.

name: poha
steps: Rinse the flattened rice in water and drain it.
Heat oil in a pan and add mustard seeds until they splutter.
Add chopped onions and green chili, sauté until onions are translucent.
Stir in turmeric powder and salt.
Add the drained flattened rice and mix well.
Cook for a few minutes, stirring gently.
Garnish with chopped coriander leaves and drizzle lemon juice before serving.

name: besan chilla
steps: In a bowl, mix gram flour, salt, turmeric powder, and water to form a batter.
Add chopped onions, green chili, ginger, and coriander leaves to the batter.
Heat oil in a pan and pour a ladle of batter to form a chilla.
Cook until the edges turn golden and then flip to cook the other side.
Repeat for the remaining batter, adding more oil as needed.
Serve hot with chutney or curd.

name: anda bhurji toast
steps: Heat oil in a pan and add chopped onions and green chili, sauté until soft.
Add chopped tomatoes and cook until they are mushy.
Crack the eggs into the pan and scramble them with the onion and tomato mixture.
Add salt and cook until the eggs are fully cooked.
Garnish with chopped coriander leaves.
Toast the bread slices until golden brown.
Serve the anda bhurji on top of the toasted bread.

name: rava upma
steps: Heat coconut oil in a pan and add mustard seeds and curry leaves.
Add chopped onions and green chilies; sauté until onions are translucent.
Stir in chopped carrots and peas, cooking for a few minutes.
Add semolina and roast for 2-3 minutes until slightly golden.
Pour in water and add salt; stir well.
Cook until the water is absorbed and the upma is fluffy.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh coriander.

name: egg dosa
steps: Heat a non-stick pan and pour a ladle of dosa batter, spreading it thin.
Beat the eggs with salt and pepper in a bowl.
Pour the beaten eggs over the dosa evenly.
Sprinkle chopped onions and green chilies on top.
Cook until the edges turn golden and the egg is set.
Fold the dosa in half and cook for another minute.
Garnish with chopped coriander leaves.
Serve hot with chutney.

name: muri ghonto
steps: Wash the rice and soak it in water for 15 minutes.
In a pan, heat mustard oil and fry the fish head until golden brown.
Remove the fish head and add sliced onions, frying until translucent.
Add ginger paste, garlic paste, turmeric powder, cumin powder, and green chilies, and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the soaked rice and stir well, then add water and salt.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and cover, cooking for 15 minutes until rice is done.
Fluff the rice and serve hot with fried fish head on top.

name: chirar pulao
steps: Heat mustard oil in a pan and add cumin seeds.
Once they splutter, add sliced onions and fry until golden brown.
Add diced potatoes and cook for 5 minutes until soft.
Stir in green peas, turmeric powder, and green chilies, and cook for another 2 minutes.
Add beaten rice, salt, and water, and mix well.
Cover and cook on low heat for 5 minutes until heated through.
Serve hot with a drizzle of mustard oil on top.

name: egg roll bengali style
steps: In a bowl, mix all-purpose flour, salt, and water to make a soft dough.
Divide the dough into small balls and roll each into a thin circle.
Heat mustard oil in a pan and cook the rolled dough until lightly browned on both sides.
In another pan, heat mustard oil and sauté sliced onions, green chili, and cabbage for 3 minutes.
Beat the eggs and pour them over the sautéed vegetables, cooking until set.
Place the egg and vegetable mixture on the cooked dough, roll it up tightly.
Serve hot with green chutney or ketchup.

name: mishti doi with roti
steps: Boil the milk and let it cool to room temperature.
Dissolve jaggery in 100 ml of water and mix with the cooled milk.
Stir in yogurt and mix well, then pour into serving bowls.
Cover and let it set in a warm place for 6-8 hours or overnight.
For roti, mix all-purpose flour, salt, and ghee, then knead into a dough.
Divide the dough into small balls, roll them out into thin circles.
Cook the rotis on a hot skillet until golden brown on both sides.
Serve the mishti doi chilled with warm rotis.

name: bread pakora
steps: Boil and mash the potatoes, then mix with chopped green chili, coriander leaves, and salt.
Cut the bread slices into halves or quarters.
Spread the potato mixture on one side of each bread piece.
In a bowl, mix gram flour, turmeric powder, cumin powder, and water to make a batter.
Heat oil in a pan for frying.
Dip the stuffed bread pieces in the batter and fry until golden brown.
Serve hot with green chutney and tomato ketchup.

name: misal pav
steps: Heat oil in a pan and sauté chopped onion until golden.
Add ginger-garlic paste and chopped tomato, cooking until soft.
Stir in mixed sprouts, green chili, misal masala, and salt.
Add water and simmer for 10 minutes until thick.
Toast the pav buns on a pan until golden.
Serve the misal hot with toasted pav and a wedge of lemon.

name: egg frankie
steps: Beat the eggs with salt, pepper, and chopped green chili.
Heat oil in a pan and scramble the eggs until cooked.
Add chopped onion and coriander leaves to the scrambled eggs.
Warm the chapatis on a separate pan.
Place the egg mixture on one half of each chapati and fold over.
Serve hot with extra chaat masala sprinkled on top.

name: congee with century egg
steps: Rinse the rice under cold water until the water runs clear.
In a pot, combine the rinsed rice and water, then bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
While the congee is cooking, peel and chop the century eggs into small pieces.
Finely chop the spring onion and ginger.
Once the congee reaches a creamy consistency, stir in the ginger and white pepper.
Serve the congee hot, topped with century egg pieces, spring onion, soy sauce, and sesame oil.

name: jianbing
steps: In a bowl, mix the all-purpose flour with water to create a smooth batter.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and add a little oil.
Pour a ladle of batter into the pan, swirling to cover the surface evenly.
Crack an egg on top of the batter and spread it out gently.
Sprinkle chopped spring onion over the egg and cook until set.
Place a crispy cracker on top, then fold the jianbing in half.
Serve hot with hoisin and chili sauce drizzled on top.

name: dim sum har gow
steps: Peel and chop the shrimp into small pieces, then mix with minced ginger, chopped spring onion, salt, and sesame oil.
In a bowl, combine wheat starch and tapioca starch, then gradually add water to form a dough.
Knead the dough until smooth, then divide into small portions.
Roll each portion into a thin circle and place a spoonful of shrimp filling in the center.
Fold the dough over to create a dumpling shape and pinch the edges to seal.
Steam the dumplings in a steamer for about 8-10 minutes until translucent.
Serve hot with soy sauce for dipping.

name: tamago gohan
steps: Place the hot cooked rice in a bowl.
Crack the egg over the rice.
Drizzle soy sauce over the egg and rice.
Gently mix the egg into the rice until well combined.
Top with shredded nori, chopped green onion, and sesame seeds.
Serve immediately while hot.

name: japanese miso soup
steps: In a pot, bring water to a simmer over medium heat.
Add miso paste and stir until dissolved.
Cut tofu into small cubes and add to the pot.
Soak wakame seaweed in water for a few minutes, then add to the soup.
Add sliced daikon radish and simmer for 5 minutes.
Chop green onion and sprinkle on top before serving.

name: okayu rice porridge
steps: Rinse the rice under cold water until the water runs clear.
In a pot, combine rice and water, and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Once the rice is soft and creamy, add salt and stir well.
Remove from heat and let sit for a few minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onion and pickled vegetables.
Add grated ginger for extra flavor if desired.

name: jok thai rice porridge
steps: Rinse the jasmine rice under cold water until the water runs clear.
In a pot, combine the rinsed rice and chicken broth, then bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for about 15 minutes until the rice is soft.
In a separate pan, cook the pork mince until browned, adding ginger and fish sauce.
Stir the cooked pork into the rice porridge and season with white pepper.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped spring onion, coriander, and a drizzle of sesame oil.

name: khao tom
steps: Rinse the jasmine rice under cold water until the water runs clear.
In a pot, combine the rinsed rice and chicken broth, then bring to a boil.
Add minced garlic and chicken breast pieces to the pot.
Reduce heat and simmer for about 10 minutes until the chicken is cooked and rice is soft.
Season with fish sauce and white pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped spring onion, coriander, and a wedge of lime.

name: thai roti with egg
steps: In a bowl, mix flour, sugar, and salt together.
Gradually add water and knead until a smooth dough forms.
Divide the dough into small balls and let rest for 10 minutes.
Roll out each ball into a thin circle and fry in a pan with oil until golden.
Crack an egg onto the roti and fold it over, cooking until the egg is set.
Serve warm drizzled with condensed milk.

name: pad kra pao with egg
steps: Heat oil in a pan and sauté minced garlic and chili until fragrant.
Add the minced pork and cook until browned.
Stir in soy sauce and fish sauce, mixing well.
Add basil leaves and stir-fry for another minute.
In a separate pan, fry an egg sunny-side up.
Serve the pork mixture over rice, topped with the fried egg.

name: mango with sticky rice
steps: Soak glutinous rice in water for at least 2 hours, then drain.
Steam the rice for about 20 minutes until cooked and sticky.
In a saucepan, heat coconut milk with sugar and salt until dissolved.
Mix half of the coconut milk into the cooked rice and let it sit.
Slice the mango into thin pieces.
Serve the sticky rice with mango slices on the side, drizzled with remaining coconut milk and sprinkled with sesame seeds.

name: frittata
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
In a skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Sauté the onion and red bell pepper until soft.
Add the spinach and cook until wilted.
In a bowl, whisk the eggs with salt and black pepper.
Pour the egg mixture into the skillet and sprinkle with parmesan.
Cook on the stovetop for 2 minutes, then transfer to the oven.
Bake for 15 minutes or until set and golden.

name: bruschetta pomodoro
steps: Toast the ciabatta bread slices until golden.
Chop the tomatoes and basil, and place them in a bowl.
Add minced garlic, olive oil, balsamic vinegar, salt, and black pepper.
Mix the tomato mixture gently.
Top each toasted bread slice with the tomato mixture.
Serve immediately while the bread is warm.

name: ricotta toast with honey
steps: Toast the sourdough bread until crispy.
Spread a generous layer of ricotta cheese on each slice.
Drizzle honey over the ricotta.
Chop walnuts and sprinkle them on top.
Drizzle with olive oil and add a pinch of black pepper.
Garnish with fresh mint leaves before serving.

name: italian crepes
steps: In a bowl, whisk together flour, eggs, milk, and vanilla extract.
Let the batter rest for 10 minutes.
Heat a non-stick skillet and melt a bit of butter.
Pour a ladle of batter into the skillet, swirling to coat evenly.
Cook for 1-2 minutes until edges lift, then flip and cook for another minute.
Repeat with remaining batter, adding butter as needed.
Serve warm with fresh berries, a sprinkle of powdered sugar, and lemon zest.

name: caprese toast
steps: Toast the ciabatta bread until golden brown.
Slice the fresh mozzarella and tomatoes.
Layer mozzarella and tomato slices on the toasted bread.
Add fresh basil leaves on top.
Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic glaze.
Season with salt and black pepper before serving.

name: buttermilk pancakes
steps: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
In another bowl, combine the buttermilk, melted butter, and vanilla extract.
Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and mix until just combined.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and melt a little butter.
Pour 60 ml of batter for each pancake onto the skillet.
Cook until bubbles form on the surface, then flip and cook until golden brown.
Serve warm with maple syrup or fresh fruit.

name: scrambled eggs on toast
steps: In a bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, salt, and black pepper.
Heat butter in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Pour the egg mixture into the skillet and stir gently with a spatula.
Cook until the eggs are softly scrambled and slightly runny.
Toast the bread slices until golden brown.
Serve the scrambled eggs on top of the toast, garnished with chopped chives.

name: french toast
steps: In a bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, vanilla extract, and cinnamon.
Heat butter in a skillet over medium heat.
Dip each slice of bread into the egg mixture, ensuring both sides are coated.
Place the soaked bread in the skillet and cook until golden brown on both sides.
Serve warm, drizzled with maple syrup.

name: oatmeal with berries
steps: In a saucepan, combine rolled oats, milk, and salt.
Bring to a boil over medium heat, then reduce to a simmer.
Cook for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until thickened.
Stir in honey and remove from heat.
Top with blueberries, sliced strawberries, and banana slices before serving.

name: breakfast burrito
steps: Chop the bell pepper and onion into small pieces.
In a skillet, melt butter over medium heat and sauté the onion and bell pepper until soft.
In a bowl, whisk the eggs with salt and black pepper.
Pour the eggs into the skillet and scramble until cooked through.
Lay a tortilla flat and fill with scrambled eggs, cheese, and salsa.
Roll the tortilla tightly and serve warm.

name: chilaquiles verdes
steps: Heat the oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add the salsa verde and bring to a simmer.
Add the tortilla chips and stir to coat them in the salsa.
In a separate pan, fry the eggs sunny-side up.
Plate the chilaquiles and top with the fried eggs.
Drizzle crema over the top and sprinkle with feta cheese.
Garnish with chopped onion and cilantro.
Serve immediately.

name: tamales de rajas
steps: Soak the corn husks in warm water for 30 minutes.
Roast the poblano pepper until charred, then peel and slice.
In a bowl, mix masa harina, baking powder, and salt.
Gradually add vegetable broth until a dough forms.
Spread masa on the soaked corn husks, add poblano, onion, and cheese.
Fold the husks and place them upright in a steamer.
Steam for about 40 minutes until firm.
Serve warm.

name: molletes
steps: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Slice the bolillo rolls in half and place them on a baking sheet.
Spread refried beans on each half of the rolls.
Top with cheese and sliced jalapeño.
Broil in the oven for about 5 minutes until the cheese melts.
Remove from the oven and drizzle with salsa.
Garnish with chopped cilantro.
Serve hot.

name: atole
steps: In a pot, combine masa harina with water to form a smooth paste.
Add milk and stir until well combined.
Add the cinnamon stick and sugar, and bring to a simmer.
Cook for about 10 minutes, stirring constantly until thickened.
Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract and salt.
Serve warm in cups.
Enjoy your atole as a comforting drink.

name: juk korean rice porridge
steps: Rinse the short grain rice under cold water until the water runs clear.
In a pot, combine the rinsed rice and water, then bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add sesame oil, salt, grated ginger, and diced carrot to the porridge.
Cook for an additional 5 minutes, then remove from heat.
Garnish with chopped green onion and drizzle with soy sauce before serving.

name: gyeran mari
steps: Finely chop the carrot and green onion.
In a bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, salt, and pepper.
Heat vegetable oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Pour in half of the egg mixture and swirl to cover the bottom of the pan.
Sprinkle the chopped vegetables over the eggs and cook until set.
Carefully roll the omelette from one side to the other and remove from the pan.
Repeat with the remaining egg mixture and vegetables.
Slice the rolled omelette into bite-sized pieces before serving.

name: banchan egg bowl
steps: Sauté minced garlic in sesame oil until fragrant.
Add spinach and cook until wilted, then season with salt and soy sauce.
In a bowl, beat the eggs and scramble them in a separate pan.
Place cooked rice in a bowl and top with sautéed spinach and scrambled eggs.
Sprinkle sesame seeds on top before serving.

name: tteok guk
steps: In a pot, boil water and add sliced beef, cooking until tender.
Add rice cakes to the pot and simmer until they are soft.
Season the soup with soy sauce and salt.
Whisk the egg and pour it into the soup, stirring gently to create ribbons.
Chop green onion and add it to the soup before serving.
Drizzle sesame oil on top for added flavor.

name: doenjang jjigae breakfast
steps: In a pot, combine water and doenjang, stirring until dissolved.
Add diced pork and cook until browned.
Chop zucchini, potato, and onion, then add them to the pot.
Simmer for about 10 minutes until vegetables are tender.
Cut tofu into cubes and gently add to the stew.
Slice green chili and add it for a bit of heat before serving.

name: menemen
steps: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and green pepper, sauté until soft.
Stir in chopped tomato, salt, and black pepper, cook for 3 minutes.
Crack eggs into the mixture and gently stir to combine.
Cook until eggs are just set, about 3-4 minutes.
Sprinkle with red pepper flakes and chopped parsley before serving.

name: labneh with olive oil
steps: Spread labneh on a serving plate.
Drizzle olive oil generously over the labneh.
Sprinkle za'atar and salt on top.
Garnish with fresh mint leaves.
Serve with warm pita bread on the side.

name: ful medames
steps: In a pot, combine cooked fava beans with olive oil and minced garlic.
Add cumin, salt, and black pepper, and heat over medium heat.
Mash some of the beans with a fork for a creamy texture.
Stir in lemon juice and cook for another 5 minutes.
Chop tomato and onion, and mix into the fava beans.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve warm.

name: banh mi op la
steps: Slice the baguette lengthwise without cutting all the way through.
In a pan, melt the butter over medium heat and fry the pork sausage until golden.
In the same pan, crack the eggs and fry until the whites are set but yolks are still runny.
Spread mayonnaise inside the baguette and drizzle with fish sauce.
Add the fried sausage and eggs into the baguette.
Top with sliced cucumber, cilantro, and a drizzle of chili sauce.
Serve immediately.

name: xoi xeo sticky rice
steps: Soak the sticky rice and mung beans in water for at least 4 hours.
Drain and steam the sticky rice for 15 minutes until cooked.
Steam the mung beans separately until soft, then mash them.
Mix the cooked sticky rice with coconut milk and salt.
Layer the sticky rice on banana leaves, then spread the mashed mung beans on top.
Sprinkle fried shallots and sesame seeds over the top.
Serve warm.

name: pho bo breakfast
steps: Bring the beef broth to a simmer in a pot.
Soak the rice noodles in hot water for 10 minutes until soft.
Thinly slice the beef sirloin and set aside.
Add sliced onion and ginger to the broth and simmer for 5 minutes.
Place the softened noodles in a bowl and pour the hot broth over them.
Top with raw beef slices, cilantro, and bean sprouts.
Serve with lime wedges and a drizzle of fish sauce.

name: banh cuon
steps: Mix rice flour with water to form a smooth batter.
In a pan, sauté chopped shallots, then add minced pork and mushrooms until cooked.
Heat a non-stick pan and pour a thin layer of batter, cooking for 2 minutes.
Add a spoonful of the pork mixture to the center and roll the batter over it.
Repeat with remaining batter and filling.
Serve with fish sauce, cilantro, and topped with fried shallots.
Enjoy warm.

name: com tam suon
steps: Marinate pork chop with fish sauce, sugar, minced garlic, and pepper for 15 minutes.
Cook broken rice in a rice cooker or pot until fluffy.
Grill or pan-fry the marinated pork chop until cooked through.
Slice cucumber and tomato for garnish.
Serve the rice on a plate topped with the grilled pork chop.
Garnish with cucumber, tomato, and chopped scallions.
Enjoy while hot.
